title: Build InstallReceiptsVault — third substrate vault, operator-local install state tracking
description: Third substrate vault after SubstrateRegistryVault + SubstrateWorkspaceVault. Tracks what's *actually* installed on this operator's machine (versus what *could* be installed per the registry). Operator-local — lives at `~/.swiftpm/bin/.substrate/install-receipts.json` rather than in the source tree. Each entry: `{ slug, execName, installTimestamp, version, sourcePackagePath, presentOnDisk }`. Typed API mirroring the other vaults: `installed(slug:)`, `recordInstall(entry:)`, `recordUninstall(slug:)`, `verifyDisk()` (reconciles vault against actual `~/.swiftpm/bin/` contents), `save()` with atomic write + `.bak.json` rotation. Build to the same Package.swift + Models.swift + InstallReceiptsVault.swift + tests pattern as the existing two vaults (~1 hour scope per established discipline). When this lands, foundry can render an Installed tab showing per-slug checkmarks + install dates + version. Pairs with the `foundry-installed-tab` bead. Wire `install-cli --execute` to write a receipt on success.
